query: Quick note since I'm on the couch finishing a video call and the sun is glaring. Close blinds 1 in the living room fully at 8 minutes from now and adjust it to 10.0% closed 26 minutes after the previous action so there is a sliver of light. Also switch heat pump 1 in the living room to heating mode 19 minutes from now to take the chill off.

I need to check the structure of the window covering controller to know the correct commands/attributes for closing it fully and setting it to 10% closed.
I need to check the structure of the heat pump to know the correct command or attribute to switch it to heating mode.
I will schedule the first action: closing the blinds fully at 18:13:59 (8 minutes from now). I will handle the subsequent actions in the next turns.
Scheduling the second action: adjusting blinds to 10% closed at 18:39:59.
Scheduling the third action: switching heat pump 1 to heating mode at 18:24:59.
All three scheduled workflows have been successfully created. I will now finish the task and provide a summary to the user.
